user_prompt: COllect relevant news articles about agentic Ai and scan recent trends about AI then write a marketing post about our app Flow
content:
In a world where every minute counts, why waste time on repetitive tasks? Meet FlowAI, your new productivity partner that gives you back 2 hours every day through intelligent automation. Our software learns your workflow, handling those tedious tasks effortlessly while integrating with over 50 of your favorite tools.

As AI technology evolves, embracing solutions like FlowAI is key to staying competitive. With the rise of agentic AI and innovations like Appier's global collaboration, the future of work is here, and it's powered by you—only smarter.

Imagine focusing on what truly matters while FlowAI takes care of the rest. Don’t let time slip away; reclaim your day and elevate your efficiency. Start your journey with FlowAI today and experience the seamless blend of automation and productivity. The future is here—let's flow together!

#FlowApp #AIP productivity #ProductivityTools #TechInnovation #WorkSmarter #AIforBusiness #EfficiencyBoost

📰 Sources:
• [Google launches Gemini 3.5 Flash and Gemini Omni AI models](https://www.gsmarena.com/google_launches_gemini_35_flash_and_gemini_omni_ai_models-news-72904.php)
• [Omio's Global Expansion Powered by Appier's Agentic AI: Scaling Acquisition Across 21 Markets](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/omios-global-expansion-powered-by-appiers-agentic-ai-scaling-acquisition-across-21-markets-302777165.html)
• [Comviva recognized in the 2026 Gartner® Market Guide for Digital Commerce Payment Platforms](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/comviva-recognized-in-the-2026-gartner-market-guide-for-digital-commerce-payment-platforms-302777241.html)
• [The workflow collision](https://webframp.com/posts/the-workflow-collision/)

articles.title: Google launches Gemini 3.5 Flash and Gemini Omni AI models
articles.description:
Today at its I/O conference, Google unveiled Gemini 3.5, its latest family of AI models, along with Gemini Omni, a new model that can create video from any input.

The first available model in the Gemini 3.5 family is Gemini 3.5 Flash. This is now out for eve…

articles.title: The workflow collision
articles.description: Your team’s workflow and your agent’s lifecycle want different things.

denial_reason: The post promotes a productivity tool without any harmful content or misleading claims.
